title: Crunchy Italian Sevaiiya Stir-fry
description: A meal-prep friendly, umami-rich dish featuring crispy sevaiiya stir-fried with onions, tomatoes, and garlic in a dash-friendly sauce.
instructions: Cut the sevaiiya into bite-sized pieces and toss them with a bit of olive oil.
In a pan, sauté the onions until translucent. Add minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the sliced tomatoes to the pan and stir-fry for about 2 minutes or until they start to soften slightly.
Toss the sevaiiya with the tomato mixture in the pan, drizzle with lemon juice, and toss well.
Transfer the sevaiiya to your preheated air fryer basket and cook for 10-15 minutes or until crispy on all sides.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
